cartMetaDescription: Review your basket, update quantities, and continue to checkout.
checkoutMetaDescription: Enter delivery details, choose payment, and place your order.
confirmationMetaDescription: Order confirmation, payment result, and next steps.
cartHeroDescription: Update quantities, apply a coupon, and continue when you are ready to place your order.
cartItemAdded: The item was added to the cart.
cartItemRemoved: The item was removed from the cart.
cartAddFailedMessage: The item could not be added to the cart.
cartUpdateInvalidMessage: The cart update request is invalid.
cartUpdateFailedMessage: The cart quantity could not be updated.
cartRemoveInvalidMessage: The cart remove request is invalid.
cartRemoveFailedMessage: The item could not be removed from the cart.
cartCouponMissingCartIdMessage: The coupon request is missing the cart identifier.
cartCouponApplyFailedMessage: The coupon could not be applied.
storefrontCartNotFoundMessage: We could not load your cart.
storefrontCartHttpErrorMessage: We could not load your cart.
storefrontCartNetworkErrorMessage: We could not load your cart.
storefrontCartInvalidPayloadMessage: We could not load your cart.
cartUnavailableTitle: We could not load your cart.
emptyCartDescription: Add products from the catalog and return here when you are ready to check out.
couponPlaceholder: Enter coupon or leave blank to clear
checkoutSummaryNote: You can check out as a guest or sign in before continuing.
followUpProductsDescription: A few related products are available if you want to keep browsing.
checkoutUnavailableTitle: Checkout is unavailable without a cart.
checkoutUnavailableMessage: Add at least one product before starting checkout.
checkoutHeroDescription: Enter your delivery address, choose shipping, review your order, and continue to payment.
checkoutAddressIncompleteErrorMessage: Shipping and billing address fields are incomplete.
checkoutPlaceOrderFailedMessage: The order could not be placed.
checkoutHostedCheckoutStartFailedMessage: Hosted checkout could not be started.
checkoutPaymentCompletionFailedMessage: Hosted checkout return could not be reconciled.
addressIncompleteMessage: Fill the required address fields to calculate shipping and totals.
savedAddressDescription: Use a saved account address to complete checkout faster.
savedProfilePrefillActiveMessage: The current checkout draft was prefilled from the member profile because no saved address was selected.
deliveryAddressDescription: Use the address where this order should be delivered.
shippingOptionsDescription: Choose an available shipping option before placing the order.
shippingSelectionMissingMessage: Choose a shipping option before placing the order.
checkoutSummaryPendingTitle: Checkout summary is not ready yet.
checkoutSummaryPendingMessage: Complete the address to see shipping and totals.
placeOrderDescription: This creates the order through the public checkout endpoint and then moves the shopper into the confirmation and payment handoff flow.
orderConfirmationUnavailableMessage: We could not load this order confirmation.
orderConfirmationDescription: Review your order result, payment state, shipping summary, and next steps.
orderPlacedMessage: The cart was successfully converted into an order. The next step is payment handoff unless the order is already marked as paid.
nextStepPaymentRetryMessage: Retry the hosted checkout handoff from this confirmation page to finish payment for the order.
paymentRecordedMessage: No additional payment handoff is required for this order.
mockCheckoutMetaDescription: Local checkout simulation for Darwin storefront flows.
mockCheckoutPageDescription: This development page simulates the hosted payment handoff for local checkout testing.
mockCheckoutSuccessMessage: Return to confirmation with a successful payment result.
mockCheckoutCancelMessage: Use this path to send the shopper back through the cancellation handoff and keep the order visible for retry.
mockCheckoutFailureMessage: Use this path to simulate a provider-side payment failure and keep the confirmation recovery flow explicit.
mockCheckoutFailureReason: Mock checkout marked the payment as failed.
mockCheckoutNotesMessage: This page is only for local checkout testing when the payment provider is configured to use the mock handoff.
